name: fuse-design
description: Design Director — impeccable methodology spine + Gemini Design MCP renderer. Sector templates, OKLCH tokens, deterministic 27-rule audit.

interface.shortDescription: Design Director — impeccable methodology + Gemini Design renderer for production-grade UI.
interface.longDescription: Design Director using the impeccable methodology as a deterministic spine and the Gemini Design MCP server as the HTML/JSX renderer. Sector templates, OKLCH P3 tokens, anti-AI-slop, WCAG 2.2 AA, 27-rule deterministic audit. Multi-stack handoff (React/shadcn, Laravel/Livewire Flux, Swift/SwiftUI).
